		Expression: inputAmountWithFee = inputAmount * 997

raw_ir:Exchange_ERC777.getInputPrice.2.raw:

raw_ir:Exchange_ERC777.getInputPrice.3.raw:

			denominator(uint256) := TMP_4(uint256)

raw_ir:Exchange_ERC777.getInputPrice.4.raw:
